changeSet.author: tatsiana.kobets
changeSet.sql: CREATE SCHEMA IF NOT EXISTS mydb;
CREATE TABLE mydb.users ( id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, email VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, password VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL );

CREATE TABLE mydb.habits ( id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, description VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, frequency VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, user_id INTEGER NOT NULL, FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES mydb.users (id) );

CREATE TABLE mydb.logs ( id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, log_date DATE NOT NULL, completed BOOLEAN NOT NULL, habit_id INTEGER NOT NULL, user_id INTEGER NOT NULL, FOREIGN KEY (habit_id) REFERENCES mydb.habits (id), FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES mydb.users (id) );
